events.label: reasoning
events.text: We are asked to produce a JSON answer for a plumbing inspection scenario. The scenario: drain slope & routing, observed condition: slope under ¼ in/ft (or over - solids stranding on steep runs). Work stage: rough-complete. Reference: IPC 704. The task: estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance. The decision must be "fail" if dangerous or non-compliant. The condition is clearly non-compliant: slope under 1/4 inch per foot is insufficient for proper drainage, leading to solids stranding. IPC 704 likely specifies minimum slope for horizontal drainage piping. So decision: fail. Risk: medium? Solids stranding can cause blockages, backups, health hazards. Could be high. I'll say high. Work stage: rough-complete. Component conditions: installed-defective (since it's installed but defective slope). Percent complete: maybe 80%? Rough-complete means roughed in, not yet closed out. I'll estimate 80. Value: the slope? The scenario says "slope under ¼ in/ft", so value could be the measured slope, but we don't have an exact number. I'll put 0.125 (1/8 in/ft) as an example, but the instruction says "estimate or interpret the measurable condition". I'll put a value like 0.125 (inches per foot) to indicate it's under 0.25. Confidence: high, 0.9. Event_time, rate, order, workable: not applicable, leave empty or default. Sound_source: not applicable. Findings: "Drain slope is less than 1/4 inch per foot, causing solids stranding." Actions: "Re-pitch the drain line to achieve minimum 1/4 inch per foot slope." Rationale: "IPC 704 requires minimum slope of 1/4 inch per foot for horizontal drainage piping. Insufficient slope leads to poor drainage and solids accumulation." References: ["IPC 704"]. So JSON output.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective"],
  "percent_complete": 80,
  "value": 0.125,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.9,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Drain slope is less than 1/4 inch per foot, causing solids stranding."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Re-pitch the drain line to achieve minimum 1/4 inch per foot slope."
  ],
  "rationale": "IPC 704 requires minimum slope of 1/4 inch per foot for horizontal drainage piping. Insufficient slope leads to poor drainage and solids accumulation.",
  "references": ["IPC 704"]
}
